prompt: A minimalist thermal receipt from "Blue Lagoon Spa Reception" in Iceland, listing geothermal entrance fees and towel rental in Icelandic króna, slightly damp from steam with volcanic rock and snow visible through a window behind it
prompt_refined: A minimalist thermal receipt from 'Blue Lagoon Spa Reception' in Iceland. The receipt clearly lists geothermal entrance fees and towel rental costs, denominated in Icelandic króna. Through a window located directly behind the receipt, a natural landscape featuring dark volcanic rock partially covered in pristine white snow is visible.
objects: text content on receipt (including 'Blue Lagoon Spa Reception', geothermal entrance fees, towel rental costs, Icelandic króna denomination)
dark volcanic rock visible through window
pristine white snow visible through window
